# Electrolyte

**Summary**: A substance containing ions and capable of carrying an electric current.

---

## How It Appears in the Thesis Collection

- [[2019-suleiman-2|Suleiman, 2019]] studied the impact of electrolytes on gas hydrate stability.

## Scientific Context

- [[2019-suleiman-2|Suleiman, 2019]] Common in produced water and brine systems.

## Key Findings Across Sources

- Ions in systems have longer-range interactions compared to neutral systems, leading to significant non-ideality. ([[2019-suleiman-2|Suleiman, 2019, p. 67]])
